description: Approved CTA button shape/treatment: an SVG path with an asymmetric rounded form filled with a linear gradient from #FFDF55 to #FAA21B (left to right).

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

description: Branded orange/yellow gradient PNG used as the full-width background for the Gradient Callout CTA section; sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning 600px content width. Do not re-host or recolor.

quotes: **Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px).

description: Minimal line illustration icon set — consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work. New icons permitted but must match this style. Default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds; min render size 32×32px in email.

quotes: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds
Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall.

Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).

note: reclassify as a style/token guideline rather than a concrete asset absent a real file reference
